name: plaid-pattern
description: Plaid Pattern - Personal Finance Manager sample app

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.db:create: psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE plaid_pattern' 2>/dev/null; psql -U postgres -d plaid_pattern -f database/init/create.sql
scripts.db:reset: psql -U postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS plaid_pattern' && psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE plaid_pattern' && psql -U postgres -d plaid_pattern -f database/init/create.sql
